units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the foundational introduction to Apex, essential for beginning any hands-on Apex development.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Following the introduction, this unit teaches how to use sObjects, a core hands-on Apex concept for interacting with Salesforce data.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: This unit focuses on hands-on Apex for data manipulation using DML, building directly on sObject knowledge.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: Essential for hands-on Apex, this unit covers writing SOQL queries to retrieve data, a fundamental skill after DML operations.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: This unit provides hands-on experience with SOSL queries, offering an alternative and complementary search method to SOQL in Apex.
